response.justification: The candidate is a versatile, experienced senior engineer (~15+ years) with genuine strengths in testing culture, mentoring, and some high-throughput systems work, but the profile does not match this role's core requirements. C++ experience is limited to a brief stint at National Instruments and a thesis project — far from the required 8 years — and his career centers on TypeScript/Node.js and DLang product and web work rather than large-scale cloud compute infrastructure. He has never held a formal technical-leadership role owning platform strategy across teams.
strengths: Long, diverse engineering career with strong software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
Real low-latency, high-throughput systems experience at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic (millions of HTTP requests/sec)
Proven mentor and knowledge-sharer through workshops, courses, and open-source project leadership
concerns: Nowhere near 8 years of C++ experience — only months of professional C/C++ work
Little production cloud compute platform or large-scale infrastructure ownership; background is web/product engineering
No formal technical-lead role managing cross-team priorities, deadlines, and platform strategy
